title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners:
Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners!
